task_completion.description: Agent navigates to and identifies the duodenal loop on the CT scan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 3D Slicer views focused on the upper abdomen, specifically the C-shaped bowel loop surrounding the pancreatic head.

task_completion.description: Agent uses the Markups ruler tool to place a measurement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A measurement line (ruler) is clearly visible drawn across a structure in one of the slice views (axial, coronal, or sagittal).

task_completion.description: The measurement is positioned correctly to measure internal luminal diameter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ruler endpoints are placed on the inner walls (mucosa) of the bowel loop, measuring the air/fluid-filled lumen rather than the wall thickness or entire bowel width.

task_completion.description: The measured value on screen matches the reported value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The numeric value displayed next to the ruler in the Slicer viewport matches the 'maximum_diameter_mm' value recorded in the final JSON report.

task_completion.description: The clinical classification is logically consistent with the measured diameter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the report, the 'classification' field matches the 'maximum_diameter_mm' based on the task rules: Normal (<=30), Mild (31-40), Moderate (41-50), Severe (>50).

task_completion.description: The agent generates a complete JSON report and saves the markup.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of 'duodenal_report.json' containing keys 'location', 'classification', 'clinical_interpretation', and evidence that 'duodenal_measurement.mrk.json' was saved (e.g., file explorer or save dialog).

integrity.description: Agent uses the GUI tools for measurement rather than scripting or estimation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Markups module active, mouse cursor interacting with the viewer, or the ruler tool being selected from the toolbar.
The ruler appears or is adjusted in the viewer, rather than the agent simply typing a number into a text file without visual measurement.

integrity.description: The task is performed within the medical imaging software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The primary workspace shown is the 3D Slicer application window, not just a code editor or terminal.
